old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-f3a7","title":"Incomplete vector type coverage in schema.json","description":"oneOf in vectors.items only defines schc_vector, l2_payload_vector, frame_vector, announce_coords_vector, meshtastic_app_compat_vector, meshcore_app_compat_vector, oscore_vector, rpl_messages_vector, ccp_tdma_vector, ccp15_vector, ccp_load_balancing_vector.
